name: SynGR: Unleashing the Potential of Cross-Modal Synergy for Generative Recommendation

description: arXiv:2605.18920v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Generative Recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm by formulating item recommendation as a sequence-to-sequence generation task over item identifiers. Recent studies have incorporated multimodal signals to provide richer token-level evidence for generation. However, existing approaches largely rely on alignment-centric fu...
author: Wei Chen, Xingyu Guo, Shuang Li, Fuwei Zhang, Meng Yuan, Jing Fan, Zhao Zhang, Deqing Wang, Fuzhen Zhuang
